presets.name: Ancient Dynasty
presets.description: Emperors, scrolls, bronze coins, dynasty maps
presets.prompt: Using the reference images as the only visual basis, create a silent image-to-video in paper-cutout scrapbook stop-motion collage style, themed as an ancient dynasty history explainer: aged parchment maps, calligraphy scrolls, bronze coins, seal stamps and hand-drawn arrows. Treat every element (people, maps, text cards, props, arrows) as an independent cutout piece. Motion must have a frame-skipping feel, subtle paper flutter, segmented displacement, and sticker-bounce effects. Keep the people from the reference images recognizable as paper cutout characters.
